title: Field-Guide Outcomes, Command Language, and REPL Contract · Language Lens: Pokedex Go User Decision
summary: A ranger team asks for a Pokedex but has not defined who uses it, which decisions it supports, what commands exist, how sessions end, or what evidence makes the command useful. Predict the user decision, Go ownership, command state, API contract, resource budget, failure, and observable evidence before reading the governing source. Planned artifact: Add and verify the pokedex go user decision increment in bounded field-guide product and REPL charter. Learners progress through prediction, explic…
objectives: Define learner, field user, decision, command sequence, accepted latency, failure consequence, and observable value before coding.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
